title: convolvulus calvertii subsp. bracteosus
intro: Convolvulus calvertii subsp. bracteosus, also known as the Bracteose Convolvulus, is a lesser-known subspecies of the Convolvulus calvertii plant, belonging to the family Convolvulaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Convolvulus calvertii subsp. bracteosus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from its leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
